_comment: Model bank: every model you can hand to `gpt summarize --model <name>`. Each entry maps a MODEL NAME to its PROVIDER and the options that provider needs, so you can run a model by name alone — the provider and required options are populated from here. `gpt summarize` with no arguments prints this bank. Installed Ollama models are also auto-discovered from the live host and merged in, so they resolve even if not listed below. Add personal/extra models in config/models.local.json (gitignored, same shape). ollama `note`s carry the 2026-06-25 RTX 3090 24GB benchmark verdict (quality% / s-per-item / completion over a 10-item sample); see README 'Local Ollama benchmark'. Duplicate tags share weights: qwen2.5-coder:latest == :7b; qwen3.6:27b-q4_K_M == :27b.

benchmark.metric: quality% = ADOS record depth; s/item = wall latency; done = LLM_OK/attempted

models.name: codex
models.note: ChatGPT-plan default; richest prose, 100% reliable on large bundles

models.name: claude
models.note: Claude plan (monthly Agent SDK credit pool)

models.name: auto
models.note: Cursor Auto router — unlimited on paid plans (routes per call)

models.name: qwen2.5-coder:3b-cpu
models.skip_reason: CPU-only build: ~5.5 min/item on the first bundle (killed). Unusable without GPU — demonstrates why the RTX 3090 is required for any local run.
